system.description: Touch a mundane person or object and roll [quality].
system.synopsis: Turn a target into a weapon

outcomes.success:
you turn the target into a weapon of your choice. Its details are determined in the following ways:
  • Threat: The weapon deals an amount of Harm based on how much you cared for this target, on a scale of 1 (Cared about the least) to 7 (Cared about the most).
  • Number of Uses: This weapon’s number of uses is based on the age of the target, on a scale of 5 (lowest age) to 1 (highest age).
  • Special Effects: If the target is human or animal, a special effect of the weapon related to the target’s personality or demeanor can be determined by you and the GM.

Anyone can use this weapon if you give it to them (or if they take it from you).
outcomes.triscendence: the weapon can either become permanent or the Target can return to its original form after its uses have been expended (it will not remember its time as a weapon).
outcomes.failure: the target is not transformed but is empowered as in a success. They know what you tried to do.
